brand.name: FINNNESS
brand.description: A vibrant, optimistic wellness and fitness tracker that combines generous spacing with highly legible, color-coded components.

rules.headers: Use tracking-tight (letterSpacing: -0.5) for headers to counteract Inter's generic feel.
rules.overlines: Use uppercase, wide tracking (letterSpacing: 1.5) for small labels.
rules.brand: The FINNNESS logo text must be Inter Black (900) with tight tracking.

icons.rules: Use vector icons from lucide-react-native. No emoji icons for primary UI.

Splash.content: Heartbeat icon centered, 'FINNNESS' in Black weight text below it, decorative wave shape SVG at bottom.

Auth (Login/Register/Forgot).form: White Card, borderRadius 16. Use #2BBFA4 as accent for Register screen.

Home Dashboard.layout: Vertical scroll. Top section: Welcome text.
Home Dashboard.stats_row: Horizontal scroll of 3 square cards (Calories #F07070, Nutrition #5CBF7A, Sleep #7B7FD4).
Home Dashboard.ctas: Row of 2 CTA buttons: 'Start Workout' (#F5C842) and 'Log Meal' (#5CBF7A).

Workout.list: Vertical list of Workout Cards. Each color-coded by type (Yoga #A17FD4, HIIT #F07070, Run #42C8F5, Strength #F5A742, Pilates #5CBF7A).
Workout.detail: Colored hero banner matching workout type, stat chips overlay, list of exercises below.

Meals.list: Daily intake progress card at top, followed by 4 meal cards (Breakfast #F5C842, Lunch #5CBF7A, Snack #F5A742, Dinner #42C8F5).

Sleep Tracker.hero: Indigo #7B7FD4 hero card displaying sleep duration.
Sleep Tracker.details: Row showing Bedtime/Wakeup. Sleep quality progress bars.
Sleep Tracker.weekly: Card with purple gradient (#9B7FD4 -> #7B7FD4) showing weekly average.

Profile.menu: 4 info ListTiles in a white Card, Preferences Card, Logout button in Red #E05C5C.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include both a testID attribute AND a data-testid attribute (for dual web/native compatability during automated testing).

image_urls.description: Healthy breakfast bowl, use for Meal Detail or Breakfast card background if needed.
Woman practicing yoga, use for Yoga Workout Detail hero banner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color hex codes provided in this JSON.
Use react-native-safe-area-context for all screen wrappers.
Use expo-linear-gradient for the Splash screen and Sleep weekly avg card.
Apply both testID="..." AND data-testid="..." to ALL Touchables, Buttons, and key text fields to ensure robust web and native testing.
Use generic spacing constants mapping to 16px horizontal and 12px vertical for general layout.
Generate code in .js files (not .tsx) as requested.
